description: Directs customers to download and use mobile app via QR code scanning for ordering convenience and app-exclusive features.
structural_recipe: Place scannable QR code prominently (on door, menu, or visual asset). Caption explains the code's purpose and key app benefits. Emphasize convenience factors like easy ordering, exclusive features, or faster service. Keep instructions simple and action-oriented. Use clear language about app access and functionality.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers embrace technology and mobile-first solutions. QR codes reduce friction for app discovery. Direct app routing increases customer lifetime value, enables personalization, and builds owned audience. Aligns with Vision 2030 digital adoption cultural momentum.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure QR code placement is physically accessible and properly lit for scanning
App must be available on both iOS and Android to avoid audience segmentation
Verify app functionality and loading speed before promotion to avoid negative first impression
Consider language preferences (Arabic/English) in app interface and caption clarity
